attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
,node_level01_ID
,node_level01_GROUP_DESCR
,NODE_LEVEL01_SEQ_NUM_INT
,node_level02_ID
,node_level02_GROUP_DESCR
,NODE_LEVEL02_SEQ_NUM_INT
,node_level03_ID
,node_level03_GROUP_DESCR
,NODE_LEVEL03_SEQ_NUM_INT
,node_level04_ID
,node_level04_GROUP_DESCR
,NODE_LEVEL04_SEQ_NUM_INT
,node_level05_ID
,node_level05_GROUP_DESCR
,NODE_LEVEL05_SEQ_NUM_INT
,node_level06_ID
,node_level06_GROUP_DESCR
,NODE_LEVEL06_SEQ_NUM_INT
,node_level07_ID
,node_level07_GROUP_DESCR
,NODE_LEVEL07_SEQ_NUM_INT
,node_level08_ID
,node_level08_GROUP_DESCR
,NODE_LEVEL08_SEQ_NUM_INT
,node_level09_ID
,node_level09_GROUP_DESCR
,NODE_LEVEL09_SEQ_NUM_INT
,node_level10_ID
,node_level10_GROUP_DESCR
,NODE_LEVEL10_SEQ_NUM_INT
,node_level11_ID
,node_level11_GROUP_DESCR
,NODE_LEVEL11_SEQ_NUM_INT
,node_level12_ID
,node_level12_GROUP_DESCR
,NODE_LEVEL12_SEQ_NUM_INT
,node_level13_ID
,node_level13_GROUP_DESCR
,NODE_LEVEL13_SEQ_NUM_INT
,node_level14_ID
,node_level14_GROUP_DESCR
,NODE_LEVEL14_SEQ_NUM_INT
,node_level15_ID
,node_level15_GROUP_DESCR
,NODE_LEVEL15_SEQ_NUM_INT
FROM
(
Select	
Coalesce(
level15.account_group_id ,level14.account_group_id 
,level13.account_group_id ,level12.account_group_id 
,level11.account_group_id ,
level10.account_group_id ,level09.account_group_id 
,level08.account_group_id ,level07.account_group_id 
,level06.account_group_id ,
level05.account_group_id ,level04.account_group_id 
,level03.account_group_id ,level02.account_group_id 
,level01.account_group_id 
) As Financial_account_group_id
,nfatv.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE 
,level01.account_group_id As node_level01_ID
,level02.account_group_id As node_level02_ID
,level03.account_group_id As node_level03_ID
,level04.account_group_id As node_level04_ID
,level05.account_group_id As node_level05_ID
,level06.account_group_id As node_level06_ID
,level07.account_group_id As node_level07_ID
,level08.account_group_id As node_level08_ID
,level09.account_group_id As node_level09_ID
,level10.account_group_id As node_level10_ID
,level11.account_group_id As node_level11_ID
,level12.account_group_id As node_level12_ID
,level13.account_group_id As node_level13_ID
,level14.account_group_id As node_level14_ID
,level15.account_group_id As node_level15_ID
,level01.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level01_GROUP_DESCR
,level02.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level02_GROUP_DESCR
,level03.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level03_GROUP_DESCR
,level04.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level04_GROUP_DESCR
,level05.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level05_GROUP_DESCR
,level06.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level06_GROUP_DESCR
,level07.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level07_GROUP_DESCR
,level08.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level08_GROUP_DESCR
,level09.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level09_GROUP_DESCR
,level10.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level10_GROUP_DESCR
,level11.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level11_GROUP_DESCR
,level12.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level12_GROUP_DESCR
,level13.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level13_GROUP_DESCR
,level14.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level14_GROUP_DESCR
,level15.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level15_GROUP_DESCR   
,level01.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL01_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level02.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL02_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level03.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL03_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level04.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL04_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level05.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL05_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level06.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL06_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level07.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL07_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level08.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL08_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level09.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL09_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level10.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL10_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level11.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL11_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level12.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL12_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level13.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL13_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level14.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL14_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level15.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT as NODE_LEVEL15_SEQ_NUM_INT
From
(
Select	*
From	$$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 1
) level01
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 2
) level02
	On	level01.account_group_id = level02.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 3
) level03
	On	level02.account_group_id = level03.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 4
) level04
	On	level03.account_group_id = level04.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 5
) level05
	On	level04.account_group_id = level05.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 6
) level06
	On	level05.account_group_id = level06.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 7
) level07
	On	level06.account_group_id = level07.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 8
) level08
	On	level07.account_group_id = level08.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 9
) level09
	On	level08.account_group_id = level09.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 10
) level10
	On	level09.account_group_id = level10.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 11
) level11
	On	level10.account_group_id = level11.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 12
) level12
	On	level11.account_group_id = level12.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 13
) level13
	On	level12.account_group_id = level13.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 14
) level14
	On	level13.account_group_id = level14.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join
(
Select	*
From	$$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node
Where	ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 15
) level15
	On	level14.account_group_id = level15.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Inner Join
	$$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_account  nfatv
	On	Financial_account_group_id = nfatv.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
) A
where not exists 
(select 1 from $$CCERTEMPVWDB.R_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_HIERARCHY RAH
			where RAH.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE= A.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE );
/* Removed MT_EIS_GEN_ACCOUNT and WI_MT_EIS_GEN_ACCOUNT load flows from ETL for CCER June FY12 Project, Required when we merge CCERTEMP to FINLGL */
